hypothesis: Δ-learning XGBoost models that predict the difference between GFN1-xTB and DFT band gaps, trained on MOF descriptors (ST-135, RACs, APRDFs), will yield DFT-band-gap predictions for MOFs with lower prediction error than direct XGBoost models predicting DFT gaps, demonstrating that correcting semi-empirical gaps with ML captures systematic DFT–GFN1-xTB discrepancies.
